song.title: Father Thy Son Beloved Leads Our Praise
song.author: Robert Allen
song.lyrics: [v1] Father, Thy Son beloved leads our praise After the banquet feast is had and done; How dear, how sweet to Thee the praise He leads, And in His praises joining we are one. [v2] Father, we need no goodness more than Thee, Nor do we seek a love that’s less than Thine; How we adore Thee now that here we know Thy searchless, uncreated life divine. [v3] Father, within Thy love our love to Thee Grows, far transcending all our earthly ties; Thine own dear love in power leads our hearts Where Thine own presence deeply satisfies. [v4] Father, by joining with Thy Son beloved, We all with gladness praise Thee now again; Joyfully feasting on Thy holy love, Tasting, as sons, the sweetness of Thy name.
